reasoning: The health potion exhibits excellent color harmony aligned with the Echoes-tuned target palette. Candy pink body (warm, saturated rose-pink) pairs with vibrant saturated green vines in a classic complementary scheme that reads BRIGHT and cheerful. The cork stopper uses a warm parchment-gold tone that bridges the two hues. Polka dots are near-white but warm enough to avoid clinical coldness. Shadow/outline darks are deep colored greens rather than pure black, preserving the warm-tinted dark requirement. All key colors map cleanly onto the reference palette — candy pink (row-1 warm rose), saturated green (row-1 sage), parchment-gold cork (row-1/2 tan-gold). No muddy, desaturated, neon, or cold-corporate tones present. Mood is unambiguously warm and playful. Minor note: the highlight dots verge on neutral white, but total mass is small and does not pull the palette cold.
